name: Bo's Bedroom
author: Poki
description: Bo’s Bedroom is a simple survival game where you help Bo escape their scary bedroom. Beat up monsters, get rid of shadows, and collect all kinds of different tokens to unlock the key and escape. Collect different weapons, and even enlist the help of a pet to fight alongside you. How fast can you get out? How to play Bo’s Bedroom? Use WASD, the arrow keys, your mouse or even your finger to walk in a certain direction. Get close to objects to interact with them. Who created Bo’s Bedroom? Bo’s Bedroom is created by Kuyi Mobile. Play their other games on Poki: Cafe Bara , Coin Machine , Sushi Merge and Tower Merge ! How can I play Bo’s Bedroom for free? You can play Bo’s Bedroom for free on Poki. Can I play Bo’s Bedroom mobile devices and desktop? Bo’s Bedroom can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
